comment:
$$\cos x(\cos 2x-1)+\sqrt{3}\sin^2x=0\\ \cos x(1-2\sin^2x-1)+\sqrt{3}\sin^2x=0\\ -2\cos x\sin^2x+\sqrt{3}\sin^2x=0\\ -\sin^2x(2\cos x-\sqrt{3})=0\\ \displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \sin^{2} x=0\\ \cos x=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=\pi n,n\in Z\\ x=\pm \frac{\pi }{6} +2\pi n,n\in Z \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
Ответ: \(x=\pi n\), \(n\in Z\); \(x=\pm\frac{\pi}{6}+2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\).
